text: As I stand here in this tilted hallway, gazing through glass at a luminous purple rectangle, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glowing light beyond the barrier seems to promise revelation, yet I remain an outsider—observing but not participating. The second room, with its creative display and bold "R+D" lettering, draws my mind into reflection about progress, coexistence, and the boundaries of innovation. The mood is contemplative, almost electric with possibility, and I am both intrigued and slightly unsettled by the unknown purpose of these spaces.
